author: bharath.vedartham
content: yes i don't have the context on the previous 2 apis being deprecated. I raised this PR cause i require them to get a p2p builder working e2e. I am happy to close my PR in favour of your PR which will contain the full context

author: jameshe5018
content: I agree for that api spec submission shouldn't be under pool it should be under validator

author: bharath.vedartham
content: you mean only the `submitSignedProposerPreferences` one right?

author: bharath.vedartham
content: I followed the pattern similar to `submitPayloadAttestationMessages` https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/blob/master/apis/beacon/pool/payload_attestations.yaml#L50, so i thought `submitSignedProposerPreferences` would work similarly too

author: jameshe5018
content: the purpose of the api is more aligned with /eth/v1/validator/prepare_beacon_proposer and /eth/v1/validator/register_validator ( which is what it's trying to replace)

author: jameshe5018
content: also wanted to ask , in terms of that event

author: jameshe5018
content: right now I'm interpreting it as 1 event per signed message, but I think it should be like an array right?  otherwise you're going to get a lot of events and it might clog the event stream

author: jameshe5018
content: aligning with the api that takes an array

author: bharath.vedartham
content: i assume the preferences channel to be pretty low volume anyways?
